posts.caption:
ITS THAT TIME! I know all of you have been very patient! However we wanted to take the time to be actually ready to shoot this and we are! Next Month Texas be ready!  This is going to rock the world!  The location and date will be dropped in a couple weeks! I invite all of you to come be a part of this experience!
#casting #tvshow #idfsuit #idfsuitproductions #acting

Starting 2025 With A BANG!!!!! Here Is A Sneak Peak My Brand New TV Show Series! Writer, Director & Starring In It.  I Want To Thank My Team And My Frllow Actors I Brought On!! This is Just The Beginning. Introducing The Lawyer:Unhinged

➡️ LONG POST ⬅️
 
 I Wrote This On A Piece Of Paper.  Then I Decided To Do The Voice-Over. 

Mental Health Is Something I Have Battled My Entire Life. No Matter How Many People You Try To Tell And Get Them To Understand You, They Won’t. However Before You Judge ANYONE Or Label Anyone Anything, Ask Yourself These Questions.

Do You Have Anger, Has Anyone Ever Hurt You?  How Do You Deal With The Tormented Mind Of Anxiety? Have You Ever Been In A Jail Cell With No One Being There For You? Crying In A Spiraled Frenzy, Been So Depressed Where You Can’t Even Move Out Of The Bed? Trauma, Abuse, Being Betrayed When You’re Loyal To A Fault, Imposter Syndrome, PTSD, Bipolar, Schizophrenia, Uplifting Everyone Besides Yourself, Being Told You’re Not Good Enough, Being Controlled , All Your Dreams Shot Down. Or My Personal Favorite Within Myself, Losing Your Shit From Stress So Badly Where You Think Is Any Of This Even Real, Is This An Illusion . While These Are All Examples ,

The Facts Are, We All Have A Story. No One Is Immune To Breaking Down. All We Can Do Is Try To Be Better Than We Were The Day Before.

This Is IDFSuit Productions First Completed Project. @elii.isdope & I Were Sitting Down Having A Business Lunch, Discussing Future Projects, In The Middle said Our Lunch I Had A Moment . We Decided To Make A Short Film . This Is The Preview Of “I’ve Lost It”  Eli Your Camera Skills, Editing , LIGHTING Are Simply Amazing. You Are Getting Better & Better Brother.  As The Founder & CEO Of IDFSuit Productions I Couldn’t Be Happier That You Are An Essential Part Of This Team & Brand We Are Building!

Always Remember, It Cost Zero Dollars To Be Kind, Of Course Put Yourself First And Protect Your Energy . Try To Be More Self Aware ago The Behaviors Around You, It Could Be A Cry For Help, Could Save A Life , If It Were You, Would You Want Yours?

-Suit

#idfsuitproductions #idontfollowsuit #reelsviral #trending #production #viral #shortfilms #foryou #reels #insta

36! I made it! 36 years on this planet!  I am truly blessed! Each year I make a birthday post , however this year hits different. I have grown as a man, friend, brother , business owner , overall human being. I am so grateful to have the family around me that I do. There isn’t a hateful bone in my body towards anyone’s I love each and every one of you .  I used to think I was so misunderstood until I have found and built my tribe.  2026 is ours & all the other years ahead of us ! A lot of you have been around while I have been building my brand and have gotten to know SUITS ! Well cheers to all of you !  THANK YOU FOR EVERYONE WHO CAME OUT LAST NIGHT FOR THE PREPARTY! Thank you to @siphausatx @tequila512 & @ghostlifestyle !

HOUSTON YOU’RE UP NEXT! WE ARE OUTSIDE TONIGHT !

Salute , SUITS
PART 2! HOUSTON TEXAS! The party continues ! Like it says in the description, if you get an inbox you are invited lol! It’s going to be a whole party ! Let’s gooooo!!!

FINAL UPDATE ! I think I’m so excited for my birthday. I had to post a date wrong three times.🤣🤣🤣 

THIS FRIDAY! Birthday Bash Part 1!
We are bringing in the PRETURNUP at @siphausatx! My birthday is being sponsored by @siphausatx , @tequila512 & @ghostlifestyle ! There will be a Live DJ, amazing drink specials, just a bad ass elegant night, They also have Hookah too! Can’t wait it’s going down!!!
Starting at 9pm-? lol

I INVITE ALL OF YOU TO JOIN ME ON THIS JOURNEY!!!! IDFSUIT PRODUCTIONS is going to change the WORLD!  One day at a time! Going into the Film Industry was the smartest and happiest thing I have ever done! This is my passion . I don’t always drop videos probably as much as I should, however, to me, everything is about quality and I have to love it, I respect every other person in their craft & their art! I take nothing away from anybody because everyone has their own style and the way they conduct their product and their business ! but to me, I’d rather drop something that means something to me with texture and substance then give you just something rushed with no meaning behind it.  You will see this name all over the world, one day telling stories and giving an authenticity to our work! trust and believe I have the most amazing people around me! I couldn’t do this without them and I think those who continue to join the work we do . Thank you for each and everyone for your support I invite all of you to witness and be a part of what we’re doing. 

Signed-Suit  Owner/ CEO of IDFSUIT PRODUCTIONS

Happy Birthday To Me! Often Enough In Life We Do Not Give Ourselves The Flowers We Deserve ! I Have Turned 35 Today. I Didn’t Think I was Going To Make It To 30 & Here I Am! I Am Extremely Grateful. I Appreciate Everyone For Showing Me The Amount Of Love Each & Every Day! 2025 Has Started Out Great For Me. Today & Tonight We Celebrate!  God Always Makes A Way For Me. I Love All Of You. Anyone Who Truly Knows Me , I Don’t Have A Hateful Bone In My Body! CHEERS EVERYONE ! Here Is To 35!🥂🥂🥂🥂🥂🥂♊️♊️♊️🗣️🗣️💯💯🔥🔥🔥🔥

I Am Beyond Ecstatic. I Will Be Making TV Shows & Movies, Any Type Of Production. It Can & Will Be Done. I Want To Thank My Team , As Well As Everyone Who Had A Hand In Making This Possible!
